ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the financial document:  AARNAV FASHIONS LIMITED's Board adopted audited financial results for FY2026 with an unmodified audit opinion. While the company achieved robust 22% year-over-year revenue growth, net profit remained largely stagnant, representing a material impact on profitability. This discrepancy is primarily attributed to a significant, almost tenfold increase in "Purchases of Stock-in-Trade," flagging potential concerns regarding cost management or inventory efficiency.
